regulation_change.context: Category: dentists, Merchant: Dr. Meera (5-year retention 42%, 1,247 high-risk adults), Trigger: regulation_change (DCI Dec 15, 1.0 mSv limit)

output.body: Dr. Meera, DCI's revised radiograph dose limits kick in on Dec 15 (48 days). 1.0 mSv max per IOPA exposure. E-speed film passes, D-speed doesn't. Your clinic's 5-year retention is 42% (above peer median 38%). 1,247 high-risk adults in YTD database need notification. Want me to draft DCI-compliant SOP + patient WhatsApp? Ready in 15 min. Reply YES to send | STOP to end -- DCI Gazette 2026-11-20 p.14
